mottoSection.quote: Build with technology, stay guided by life.

footer.description: A front-end technology blog, covering code details, engineering framework, and best practices. We hope that each article here will make the technology clearer.
footer.emailCopyFailed: Failed to copy email, please copy manually.

hero.title: Overthinker
hero.subtitle: Build / Think / Create
hero.desc: A personal corner for engineering notes, product-minded thinking, and continuous frontend craftsmanship.

profile.label: Profile
profile.title: Self-introduction and personal statement
profile.description: I focus on turning ideas into maintainable interfaces, balancing user experience, engineering quality, and long-term scalability.

interests.label: Interests
interests.title: Who I am outside coding
interests.description: Interests keep me creative and disciplined, and they often inspire better product and interaction decisions.
items: Hiking and basketball to stay physically active
Reading tech, design, and history books
Writing blog notes to summarize lessons learned
Exploring UI/UX details in real products

react.name: React
react.description: Build interactive interfaces with declarative rendering and reusable component boundaries.
highlights: Composable UI for medium and large apps
Strong ecosystem for routing and state management

vue.name: Vue
vue.description: Delivers rapid implementation with clean templates, reactive APIs, and mature tooling.
highlights: Easy adoption from small pages to full systems
Great single-file component workflow

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.description: Improves reliability with static contracts and safer refactoring in collaborative projects.
highlights: Safer interfaces across modules
Better editor feedback and maintainability

javascript.name: JavaScript
javascript.description: Core runtime language for web applications, interaction logic, and platform APIs.
highlights: Essential for browser and Node.js development
Flexible syntax for diverse application scenarios

nextjs.name: Next.js
nextjs.description: Provides hybrid rendering, routing conventions, and server capabilities for modern web apps.
highlights: SSR, SSG, and App Router for flexible architecture
Good defaults for performance and SEO

nuxtjs.name: Nuxt
nuxtjs.description: A production-ready framework to build Vue applications with routing, data fetching, and SSR support.
highlights: Convention-driven structure for fast setup
Balanced DX for content and product websites

vite.name: Vite
vite.description: Optimizes local development and production build pipelines with fast startup and HMR.
highlights: Very fast feedback loop in development
Modern build tooling with broad framework support

webpack.name: Webpack
webpack.description: A highly customizable bundler for complex build requirements and legacy compatibility.
highlights: Flexible plugin ecosystem
Fine-grained control of assets and optimization

tailwindcss.name: Tailwind CSS
tailwindcss.description: Speeds up UI delivery through composable utility classes and consistent design tokens.
highlights: Fast styling iterations in product teams
Strong consistency with design systems

sass.name: Sass
sass.description: Extends CSS with variables, mixins, and modular patterns to keep style architecture scalable.
highlights: Improves code organization for large stylesheets
Reusable patterns for design consistency

redux.name: Redux
redux.description: Predictable state container for complex client applications and cross-module data flow.
highlights: Clear unidirectional data flow
Great debugging with devtools and middleware

nodejs.name: Node.js
nodejs.description: Powers frontend tooling, API services, and automation scripts with an event-driven runtime.
highlights: Shared JavaScript language across stack
Rich package ecosystem for engineering tasks
